html:
Exclusive to:

“Adds 25 points of moisture to Garden Soil per use.

Can also put out fires and stop smouldering.”

-

The Waterfowl Can is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them update. It is prototyped at the Alchemy Engine with two Driftwood Pieces, one Rope, and one Malbatross Bill.

The Waterfowl Can has the same functionality as a Watering Can but has 4 times as many uses before needing to be refilled. Ice and Water Balloons still only refill by one use.

Watering cans are used to add 25 points of moisture to a Farm Soil Tile in order to improve Farm Plant growth and reduce Plant Stress. They can also extinguish Fires and Smoldering.

The Waterfowl Can has 160 uses, and can be refilled fully at Ponds, Hot Springs, the Oasis Lake, and Vitreoases. Ice or Water Balloons can be used to refill it by 1 use, while Snowballs refill it by 0.3 uses.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Decorator's Collection
Koalefant Can
Can your watering can water as well as a Koalefant can?

Tips

  • The player can use the Malbatross Bill for rowing until it's close to breaking. Then it can be crafted into the Waterfowl Can and deconstructed with a Deconstruction Staff to retrieve the Malbatross Bill at 100% durability.

Trivia

  • The Watering Can and the Waterfowl Can were introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
  • The blueprint requirement was replaced with prototyping in the March 2022 QoL update.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

premiumwateringcan
“It's been improved with science... and bird parts!”
–Wilson
“Ha. It looks stupid.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang can carry much water in that.”
–Wolfgang
“What an odd looking watering can.”
–Wendy
“I HATE IT EVEN MORE”
–WX-78
“A bit unconventional, but an effective irrigation tool nevertheless.”
–Wickerbottom
“I just don't like the look of that thing... can't put my finger on it...”
–Woodie
“I really don't care for gardening.”
–Maxwell
“Why must we cöddle the plants thus?”
–Wigfrid
“Our watering can back home didn't look anything like that.”
–Webber
“To make the finest ingredients, our plants need the finest care.”
–Warly
“Fancy drink can”
–Wormwood
“As long as it works, I don't care what it looks like.”
–Winona
“This reminds me of a certain bird we ran afowl of.”
–Wortox
“Splishy birdy can.”
–Wurt
“Wow, fancy!”
–Walter
“I knew that beak would come in handy.”
–Wanda
“Adds 25 points of moisture to Garden Soil per use.
Can also put out fires and stop smouldering.”
-

The Waterfowl Can has 160 uses, and can be refilled fully at Ponds, Hot Springs, the Oasis Lake, and Vitreoases. Ice or Water Balloons can be used to refill it by 1 use, while Snowballs refill it by 0.3 uses.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lon Chim Nước là một Vật Phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together và được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật Return of Them. Nó được tạo nguyên mẫu tại Alchemy Engine với hai Mảnh gỗ lũa, một Dây thừng và một Bill Malbatross.

Watering cans are used to add 25 points of moisture to a [[Farm Soil Tile]] in order to improve [[Farm Plant]] growth and reduce [[Farm Plant#Stress|Plant Stress]]. They can also extinguish [[Fire]]s and [[Summer|Smoldering]]. The Waterfowl Can has 160 uses, and can be refilled fully at [[Pond]]s, [[Hot Spring]]s, the [[Oasis Lake]], and [[Vitreoasis|Vitreoases]].
